---
name: Design proposal
about: Propose a UI/UX improvement or new design
labels: design
---

## Summary

A brief description of the design change you're proposing.

## Current state

What does the current UI/UX look like, and what's the problem?

## Proposed design

Describe or attach your design (Figma link, screenshots, sketches).

## Scope

Which screens or components are affected?
